design_plan: rng_seed=42; hero_math=1120px max-width, 2–3 line H1; AIDA_check=pass; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense verified; button_contrast=black/white pills pass; label_sweep=all competitors mentioned
headline: Super vs Folk

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Folk. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Folk

summary: A fair, editorial comparison for people evaluating Super against Folk. Folk is positioned as a people‑centric CRM and collaboration tool, while Super is positioned as the sharper alternative for repeated computer‑use workflows: a personal AI agent that can operate real computers and reuse a computer-use cache to make ongoing work faster and cheaper over time. The page also situates Folk and Super within the wider market that includes Orchids, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok.
